    Method
    Description

    BaseCtl.deleteMany(String[] ids, String pageNo, F form)
    Deletes multiple records and returns updated list.

    Fetch record by ID.
    ORSResponse

    Saves or updates entity based on ID.
    ORSResponse
    BaseCtl.search(F form, int pageNo)
    Search records with pagination.
    ORSResponse
    BaseCtl.validate(org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
    Validates request binding errors and returns ORSResponse.

    ORSResponse

    Logs out the current user session.
    ORSResponse
